N_eff.image: Z6 = Z2 x Z3 orbifold on H_R; cube root extracts per-generation eigenvalue via Z3 lepton flavor symmetry. Dual: KK + Casimir on M4 x CP2 x S2 x S1

1/alpha.image: Quadratic-Casimir <g1|T_BC x T_BC|g4>/pi on H_R; g1 = U(1) Galois orbit, g4 = EW orbit under Z-hat*. Hecke eigenvalues lambda_p^(1) * lambda_p^(4) over bridge primes. Automorphic: pi_1 x pi_4 of GL(1) x GL(2)/Q

cards.what: N_eff geometric image: Z6 orbifold projection with Z3 per-generation extraction
cards.why: Fills blank cell N_eff x geometric; connects arithmetic (gamma_6^{1/3}) to compact-space topology
cards.data: N_hat_eff = (P6 T_BC P6)^{1/3}. Z6 = Z2 (mirror) x Z3 (generation). Additive dual: KK + Casimir on M4 x CP2 x S2 x S1 (Paper 2). Both give 3.35 at 0.0082%.
cards.use: Grammar Rule 6 (FRACTIONAL) now has geometric grounding for k=3 exponent

cards.what: 1/alpha algebraic image: quadratic-Casimir Hecke eigenvalue product on U(1) x EW Galois orbits
cards.why: Fills blank cell 1/alpha x algebraic; explains why couplings are PRODUCTS (quadratic Casimir from F^2 Lagrangian) vs masses which are SUMS (linear T_BC)
cards.data: 1/alpha = <g1|T_BC^2|g4>/pi. g1 = U(1) orbit (dim adj = 1), g4 = EW orbit (1+3 = 4 generators). Hecke: lambda_p^(1)*lambda_p^(4) over {2,3,5,7,19}. Automorphic: pi_1 x pi_4 of GL(1) x GL(2)/Q. 0.1*log(pi) correction = 2nd-order Hecke perturbation.
cards.use: Grammar Rule 2 (PRODUCT) now has algebraic grounding: quadratic Casimir forces product structure for all gauge couplings
